channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺🇪🇺 Russian and Ukrainian Drones Stray Into NATO Countries as Aerial War Spills Over
item.description: Drones launched by both Russia and Ukraine are veering off course, entering airspace of NATO members Lithuania and Romania, raising concerns about alliance escalation as the conflict's aerial dimension expands beyond combat zones.

item.title: 🛢️📉 OPEC Output at Lowest Since 2000 as US Blockade Squeezes Iran
item.description: OPEC oil production in May fell to its lowest level in over two decades as the US naval blockade cut Iran's exports and Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupted shipments from other Gulf producers.

item.title: 📈💵 US Inflation Surges to Three-Year High of 4.2%
item.description: Consumer prices in the United States climbed sharply in May, reaching the highest inflation rate in three years and adding pressure on households already facing elevated living costs.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇨🇳🚀 Taiwan Fires Rockets Toward China in Defensive Drill Using US Launchers
item.description: Taiwan's military conducted a live-fire exercise sending rockets in China's direction from US-supplied HIMARS mobile launching systems, demonstrating defensive capabilities amid heightened cross-strait tensions.

item.title: ⚠️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump and Iran Trade New Threats After Military Strikes
item.description: President Trump warned Iran will "pay the price" for delaying negotiations while Tehran vowed retaliation, as both sides exchanged threats following US strikes and Iran's downing of a US helicopter.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Ceasefire Crumbles as Trump Says Tehran Will Pay Price for Failed Talks
item.description: A US-Iran ceasefire appears to have collapsed after Trump warned Iran will face consequences for not reaching a deal, with fresh US strikes and Iranian retaliation reported.

item.title: 💰 US Consumer Inflation Hits Fastest Pace in Three Years as Iran War Drives Energy Costs
item.description: US consumer inflation increased at its fastest pace in three years in May as the Middle East conflict raised gasoline and energy prices, giving the Fed more reason to keep rates unchanged.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Inventories Headed for Multi-Decade Lows as Iran War Disrupts Supply, EIA Warns
item.description: US oil inventories are on track to reach multi-decade lows as the Iran conflict disrupts global supply chains and the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed.

item.title: 🇮🇷 World Food Program Director: Iran War Could Create Global Hunger Crisis
item.description: The head of the World Food Program warned that continued conflict with Iran could trigger a global food crisis, affecting vulnerable populations far beyond the combat zone.

item.title: 🇶🇦 Qatari Negotiators Travel to Tehran to Narrow Gaps in US-Iran Nuclear Talks
item.description: Qatari mediators arrived in Tehran to help bridge differences between Washington and Tehran as diplomatic efforts continue alongside military operations.

item.title: 🌍 US Allies Condemn Iran's Lethal Plotting in Europe, North America and Australia
item.description: A coalition of US allies issued a joint statement condemning Iran's alleged assassination plots and covert operations targeting dissidents and officials across Europe, North America and Australia.

item.title: ⚔️ Cargo Vessel Exchanges Fire With Armed Craft Off Yemen Coast, UKMTO Reports
item.description: A commercial cargo ship exchanged fire with unidentified armed vessels off the coast of Yemen, according to the UK Maritime Trade Operations authority, highlighting ongoing maritime security risks.

item.title: 🇹🇼🚁 US Usually Sells Weapons to Taiwan — With Drones, Expect the Reverse
item.description: Taiwan is emerging as a major exporter of military drones to the US, reversing the traditional defense trade relationship as Washington seeks to bolster its drone capabilities.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 North Korea's Kim Claims 'Victory' After Xi Visit, but Limits on Alliance Remain
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un declared his China visit a victory for bilateral ties, though analysts note Beijing continues to limit the depth of its alliance with Pyongyang.

item.title: 🇦🇷📉 Argentine Peso Drops Most in Eight Weeks After Midterm Election Shock
item.description: Argentina's peso fell sharply following midterm election results that rattled markets, testing the government's economic stabilization program.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Military Helicopter Crashes in Kashmir, All on Board Killed
item.description: A Pakistani military helicopter crashed in the Kashmir region with no survivors, according to Pakistani officials who are investigating the cause.

item.title: 🏛️ Drones Hit Historic Museum in Russia-Annexed Crimea, Officials Alter Train Schedule
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck a historic museum in Russian-annexed Crimea, causing damage and prompting local authorities to change train schedules in the region.

item.title: 🇦🇫 Pakistan Airstrikes Kill at Least 13 in Afghanistan, Taliban Says
item.description: Pakistan conducted airstrikes in Afghanistan that killed at least 13 people, according to Taliban officials, amid rising cross-border tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Anti-Immigrant Violence Erupts Across Belfast After Knife Attack
item.description: Violent anti-immigrant protests spread across Belfast following a knife attack, with clashes reported in multiple neighborhoods.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Rises Nearly 1% as US Launches New Strikes on Iran and Supply Tightens
item.description: Oil prices rose as fresh US military strikes against Iran tightened global supply concerns, with markets bracing for further disruption.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Erdogan Says Israel's Attacks on Syria and Lebanon Threaten Turkey Too
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan warned that Israel's ongoing military operations in Syria and Lebanon pose a direct threat to Turkey's security.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Warns Russian Attacks on Odesa Ports Threaten Export Collapse
item.description: Ukrainian officials warned that continued Russian strikes on Odesa port infrastructure threaten to collapse the country's vital agricultural exports.

item.title: 💰 EU Proposes 21st Sanctions Package Targeting Russia's Banks
item.description: The European Union proposed a new round of sanctions targeting Russian financial institutions as pressure on Moscow continues.

item.title: ⛪ Israel's West Bank Operations Amount to Ethnic Cleansing, Amnesty International Says
item.description: Amnesty International accused Israel of ethnic cleansing in the occupied West Bank, documenting forced displacements and home demolitions.
